generator: oh-my-design parallel agent extraction (Claude Code Agent tool, no API key)

items.visual_theme: Warm, photography-forward marketplace feeling like a travel magazine where every page invites you to book — pure white canvas with Rausch Red accent.
items.signature_motion: Heart-icon save: outline to filled Rausch Red over motion-fast with ease-warm and small scale pulse.

items.visual_theme: Clean, enterprise-friendly platform communicating sophisticated simplicity through white canvas, deep navy text, and Swiss-precision typography with positive letter-spacing.
Controlled drama — vast pure black and near-white expanses as cinematic backdrops for products photographed as gallery sculptures. Reductive minimalism as reverence.
items.signature_motion: Pull-to-refresh: spring-physics indicator follows drag, springs back below threshold or detaches above.

items.visual_theme: Korean food delivery brand turning takeout into cultural experience through typography, humor, and a deliberately counter-industry warm mint green.
Automotive engineering made visual — precision, performance, and German industrial confidence with cinematic dark/light rhythm and angular zero-radius geometry.
Monochromatic restraint — grayscale world where boldness comes from confidence of black text on white space, not color. Architectural Cal Sans headlines.
antipatterns: No CSS borders when shadows work

items.visual_theme: Literary salon reimagined as product page — warm, unhurried, quietly intellectual on parchment canvas evoking premium paper rather than digital surface.
items.signature_motion: Typewriter streaming: model output appears character by character at actual decoding timing — never faked or replayed.

items.visual_theme: Warm, playful celebration of color treating B2B data enrichment like a craft — cream backgrounds, named swatch palette, hand-made paper texture.
High-performance cockpit in acid yellow-green on obsidian black — terminal-grade aesthetic screaming speed through visual mass and high-contrast neon.
Polished enterprise command deck — confident, clean, designed to make AI feel like serious infrastructure. Bright white canvas with 22px signature card radius.
Clean, trustworthy crypto platform; blue-and-white binary palette with alternating dark and light sections, proprietary Coinbase fonts.
Nocturnal developer command center; pitch-black canvas with cyan and cobalt bioluminescent glows and barely-visible white-border containment.

Hyper-efficient Korean discount warehouse: clean white canvas, near-black text, and the warm rocket-exhaust Coupang Red carrying CTAs, price emphasis, and the 로켓배송 badge. Information-dense product grids fit 4-5 cards per row with sharp 0-4px corners and tabular price stacks.
items.signature_motion: Add-to-cart fly performs a brief 8% scaled translate of the thumbnail toward the cart icon with a +1 badge increment — confirms without blocking.

items.visual_theme: Warm minimalism meets code-editor elegance; cream canvas with warm near-black text, three-font system, oklab borders, full-pill CTAs.
items.signature_motion: Hover text shifts to warm crimson #cf2d56; shadows transition over 200ms ease for elevation changes.

items.visual_theme: Material Design adapted for East-Asian forum culture; deep teal-navy header framing light-gray content with white post cards.
items.signature_motion: Material easing cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1) with .15s hover/press and .3s page transitions.

items.visual_theme: Restrained elegance on near-white canvas; ethereal light-weight Waldenburg display, multi-layered sub-0.1 opacity shadows, warm stone pill CTAs.
Luminous airy developer platform; cool-tinted off-white canvas with strictly monochromatic chrome and pill-shaped geometry throughout.
Digital editorial with chiaroscuro rhythm; alternating black cinematic and white editorial panels, Ferrari Red used surgically as accent.
Black-and-white interface chrome with vibrant multi-color hero gradients; variable font with unusual weight stops and pill-and-circle geometry.

voice_fingerprint.sentence_length: short and aspirational in marketing; longer colloquial in blog
voice_fingerprint.metaphor_density: low in chrome; moderate in editorial blog titles
voice_fingerprint.vocabulary_register: designer jargon assumed without gloss (frame, component, auto-layout)

items.signature_motion: Multiplayer cursor presence updates at raw frame rate with no easing; chrome uses cubic-bezier only, no spring or bounce.

items.visual_theme: Cinematic pure-black void canvas; GT Walsheim with extreme negative tracking, Framer Blue as sole accent, pill buttons and product screenshots as hero.
antipatterns: additional accent colors beyond Framer Blue
items.signature_motion: Scale-based animations using matrix transform with 0.85 scale factor and opacity transitions for reveals.

items.visual_theme: Open-source enterprise SaaS Vibes system; deep enterprise blue brand with three-tier token architecture and Japanese-first font stack.
Enterprise infrastructure: dual light/dark modes, HashiCorp Sans heads, multi-product token-driven color, whisper shadows, tight radii.
Carbon-driven corporate precision: white canvas, IBM Plex Sans light display, single Blue 60 accent, 0px radii, flat layered surfaces.
Warm editorial SaaS: cream canvas, Saans with extreme negative tracking, Fin Orange accent, sharp 4px radii, scale-based hover physics.
items.signature_motion: Buttons scale(1.1) on hover, scale(0.85) on active for physical feel.

items.visual_theme: Friendly Korean messenger: Kakao Yellow accent on white, system fonts, 12px radii standard, flat depth, chat-bubble centric UI.

Banking-formal restraint with character flavoring: near-monochrome white canvas with KakaoBank Yellow reserved for the symbol, app icon, debit card faces, and primary CTAs. The corporate site is almost black on white; yellow earns its space only where trust is already established.
items.signature_motion: Transfer-success check icon scales 0.6 → 1.0 with a controlled spring — the brand's '끝났어요' signature, the one licensed overshoot.

items.visual_theme: Warm neighborhood marketplace: Karrot Orange singular accent, system fonts, 4px grid, three-tier tokens, minimal neutral shadows.
Trustworthy crypto: Kraken Purple commands white canvas, dual brand/product fonts, 12px button radii, whisper shadows, cool neutrals.

Public service utility, not marketing brand: pure white canvas with near-black body text and Government Blue functioning as the singular action color — never decoration. Thin gray borders and 8px corners carry separation; visual weight is consistently subdued and accessibility (KWCAG 2.1 AA) is enforced at the token layer.
items.signature_motion: Menu/dropdown opens with a 400ms ease-in-out opacity + translateY(-4px → 0) — no spring, no overshoot, all transitions resolve under 400ms.

items.visual_theme: Curator's grocer: a quiet white-and-cream gallery wall where the only saturated thing is one deep editorial Kurly Purple. Photography-forward product grids on cream/white with restrained chrome and a single premium aubergine repeated just often enough that the eye learns to associate it with 'Kurly promised this.'
items.signature_motion: Product card hover-lift raises shadow without any scale change — restraint over carnival, photography stays the same size.

items.visual_theme: Cathedral of darkness: pure black canvas, LamboType uppercase at extreme scales, gold-only accent, 0px radii, surface-layer depth.
Editorial messenger super-app: white canvas with finite LINE Green, locale-aware system fonts, weight-700 dominance, 50px pill controls.
items.signature_motion: Sticker send scales 0.8→1.05→1.0 with soft overshoot ease-sticker.

items.visual_theme: Dark-mode-native craft tool: near-black canvas, Inter Variable weight 510 with negative tracking, indigo accent, semi-transparent white borders.
items.signature_motion: Command palette opens at 100ms ease-enter; no springs or bounce anywhere.

items.visual_theme: Warm humanist builder: parchment cream canvas, Camera Plain humanist type, opacity-derived grays, inset shadow buttons, pill action toggles.
Commerce-density marketplace with red attention accent, sharp 4px corners, 681 semantic tokens, system Japanese-first font stack.
items.signature_motion: 0.25s sheet/snackbar slides via cubic-bezier(0.65,0,0.35,1) and (0.33,1,0.68,1).

items.visual_theme: White canvas with colorful gradient product cards, pill nav, multi-font system, purple-tinted shadows for approachable AI.
White, airy documentation canvas with green accent, atmospheric gradient hero, full-pill buttons, whisper 5% borders.
White canvas with pastel collaboration accents, Roobert geometric display, ring-shadow borders, generous rounded panels.
Warm golden-amber European universe, 82px display with -2.05px tracking, sharp corners, multi-layer amber shadows.
Forest-black teal canvas with neon green accents, serif hero authority, monospace uppercase labels, teal-tinted shadows.

Editorial street-fashion magazine cut to grid: monochrome black-and-white discipline on pure white with a single saturated sale red used scarcely, hairline #eeeeee borders, and dense 13-14px Pretendard type with tight negative tracking. Photographs are the only thing on screen permitted to carry color.
items.signature_motion: Product card tap dims image to 92% opacity on press without scaling — preserving the magazine print metaphor.

items.visual_theme: Korean newsstand at 7am: dense, utilitarian, search-first portal on pure white with achromatic gray text and a single decisive Naver Green accent — the iconic 녹색창 search-bar frame. Information-dense over the fold with native Korean fonts and the green reserved as brand mark, search frame, and primary CTA.
items.signature_motion: Search autocomplete reveals suggestions below the input as a flat 150ms fade — invisible motion, never noticed by the user.

items.visual_theme: Warm-neutral analog canvas, NotionInter compressed display, whisper 1px borders, multi-layer sub-0.05 shadows.

voice_fingerprint.register: terse imperative at surface, essayistic in long-form

items.signature_motion: Block drag-handle fade-in on hover at 150ms ease-gentle.

items.visual_theme: Stark black-white binary contrast with electric green signal accent, 2px sharp corners, green-bordered transparent CTAs.

Photo-album-meets-shopping-cart: warm-neutral canvas (white, off-white, soft fill) with a single clean Ohouse Blue accent — the open-window blue of a sunlit room. Two co-equal card archetypes (UGC photo card and product card) anchor every surface so real Korean homes carry the brand and chrome recedes.
items.signature_motion: Bookmark save flashes #E8F7FD behind the icon while it fills to Ohouse Blue solid — a quiet confirmation, not a celebration.

items.visual_theme: Pure-white grayscale void, SF Pro Rounded softness, binary 12px/9999px radius, zero shadows, llama line-art.
Terminal-native warm-dark canvas, Berkeley Mono single typeface, 4px sharp corners, flat zero-shadow, Apple HIG semantics.
High-density Asian commerce marketplace; teal-navy primary with coral purchase CTA, locale-aware fonts, flat bordered buttons.
Warm inspiration canvas with olive/sand neutrals, singular bold red, generous radii, photography-first masonry grid.
Anti-corporate developer wiki on sage-cream parchment, olive text, hand-drawn hedgehogs, hidden orange hover flash.
items.signature_motion: Hover flash to PostHog Orange text across buttons, links, cards.

items.visual_theme: Clean study desk lit by a single warm lamp: near-white canvas with charcoal text and a saturated QANDA Orange used as the energy mark — the highlighter pen on a math worksheet. Mobile-first edutech minimalism with the camera/image-upload affordance centered on every question surface.
items.signature_motion: Step-by-step solution reveal fades each numbered step in with an 8px upward translate at 80ms intervals, ending with a soft green checkmark scale-spring.

items.visual_theme: Near-black blue-tinted void simulating macOS chrome; layered inset shadows, airy letter-spacing, red as punctuation.
items.signature_motion: Opacity-based hover (0.6) instead of color shifts across all buttons.

items.visual_theme: French automotive showroom with aurora gradients, NouvelR geometric type, zero-radius black/white CTAs, yellow accents.
Developer playground with explosive orange-magenta gradient hero, massive 128px display type, universal pill geometry.
Theatrical pure-black gallery with three-font hierarchy, icy blue-tinted borders, pill buttons, whisper shadows.
Fintech billboard scale; near-black/white binary, Aeonik 136px display, universal pill buttons, restrained marketing surface.

Long-form reading room dressed as a storefront: near-pure white canvas with a deep charcoal foreground and no saturated brand color — the iconic BookCard with multi-layer soft shadows is the brand. Two-typeface system (Pretendard Std for chrome, proprietary RIDIBatang for reading) and editorial near-monochrome restraint.
items.signature_motion: BookCard hover-lift translates y:-2px and escalates a two-layer shadow from soft to standard — covers float on paper, not glass.

items.visual_theme: Cinematic film-reel canvas where full-bleed photography is the UI; single typeface, dark cool neutrals, invisible chrome.
Nocturnal command center; near-black canvas, achromatic gray ramp, neon accents, machined display type with extreme negative tracking.
items.signature_motion: Universal hover shifts interactive elements to electric blue (#0052ef).

items.visual_theme: Dark IDE aesthetic with warm purple-black backgrounds, lime accent, and tactile inset-shadow buttons.
Cinematic full-viewport photography on pure black with stenciled uppercase aerospace typography.
Near-black immersive theater where album art carries color and pill geometry rules buttons.
Light navy-and-purple fintech with whisper-weight headlines and blue-tinted multi-layer shadows.
items.signature_motion: Dashboard table rows fade-in-from-below 3px on live event streams.

items.visual_theme: Dark-mode-native developer platform with emerald accents and translucent border-defined depth.
White luxury canvas punctuated by a single deep purple gradient hero and warm cream buttons.
Gallery-like white canvas with full-viewport vehicle photography and a single blue CTA accent.
Pastel pink-blue-lavender gradients on white paired with a deep midnight blue research zone.
Calm white canvas with optimistic cerulean interactions and breathing room around financial amounts.
items.signature_motion: Balance updates slide old number up 20px and new number in from below 20px.

items.visual_theme: Stark black-and-white duality with pill-shaped controls and warm human illustrations.
Gallery-white canvas with near-black text and shadow-as-border craft; minimalism as engineering principle.
items.signature_motion: Shadow-border hover lift; card shadow intensifies without translation.

items.visual_theme: Carbon-black command terminal pulsing with emerald signal green; warm-neutral borders soften the dark.
items.signature_motion: Emerald drop-shadow glow pulses 2px to 8px on the bolt logo.

items.visual_theme: Warm earthy near-black canvas with parchment text and nature photography; terminal as lifestyle brand.
Bright white canvas with Webflow blue and rich secondary palette; precise variable-font confidence.
items.signature_motion: translate(6px) hover slide on buttons.

items.visual_theme: Off-white canvas with billboard-bold black headlines and lime-green pill CTAs; nature-inspired fintech.
items.signature_motion: scale(1.05) hover and scale(0.95) active button compression.

items.visual_theme: Brutalist dark canvas with monospace at extreme display scale; depth via opacity and contrast only.
items.signature_motion: Hover dims links to 0.5 opacity instead of brightening.

items.visual_theme: Korean weekend getaway: clean white canvas with warm near-black headings and the unmistakable Yanolja Orange — a coral-red-orange sunset hue calibrated to feel like a vacation poster. Image-dominant lodging cards with prominent discount percentages, 8px standard radius, and a discount-first information hierarchy.
items.signature_motion: Discount-badge first-paint scales 0.85 → 1.0 with a soft spring so the coral percentage reads before the price.

items.visual_theme: Hospitality-grade Korean lodging booking surface: clean white canvas with a single confident Yeogiotte Blue accent and photography-as-brand listing cards. Cleaner and quieter than competing super-apps, with three-tier radii (8px buttons / 12px cards / 100px filter pills) and badge-driven promo grammar.
items.signature_motion: Filter-chip selection fills #1D8BFF with no geometry change over motion-fast/ease-standard — fast and committed, never bouncy.

items.visual_theme: Cream paper canvas with reddish-warm near-black text and signature orange; warm approachable automation.
items.signature_motion: Inset orange underline marks active tabs; sand underline previews hover.

items.visual_theme: Editorial select-shop magazine on pure white with pure black ink — photography first, oversized margins, Pretendard-only typography, no shadows, no brand color beyond black-on-white.
antipatterns: No corporate ~합니다 ending on consumer voice
items.signature_motion: Color inversion on inverted CTA hover — #000000 ↔ #ffffff with 2px radius, no scale, no shadow.

items.visual_theme: MZ-coded mobile-first style commerce on white canvas — vibrant pink-coral reserved for commercial pressure (CTA, sale, urgency) while neutrals carry the photography-dense 4-up grid.
items.signature_motion: Heart/찜 tap: outline to filled pink with brief scale pulse on the bottom-pinned 구매하기 bar.

items.visual_theme: Trustworthy financial advisor on white with warm near-black text and saturated salad-green for all interaction — 2px radius dominance, dense data tables, Pretendard 700 numerals as headings.
items.signature_motion: Brand green focus/hover lightens to #10df99 — interaction makes things lighter, never darker; subtle single-layer shadow.

items.visual_theme: Warm medical platform on white with bluegray neutrals and a single saturated orange — hairlines over shadows, exact numerals on hospital and procedure cards, regulatory disclosure as part of trust.
antipatterns: No 예뻐지세요! or ✨💖 emoji on medical surfaces
items.signature_motion: Hospital card hover: 1px #d8dfe6 hairline darkens; orange accent appears only on the booking CTA, never on hover decoration.

items.visual_theme: Warm friendly fintech that feels like a continuation of KakaoTalk — Noto Sans KR on near-white canvas, rounded geometry as brand commitment, Kakao yellow as ecosystem anchor (not default CTA), 3:1 contrast minimum enforced.
items.signature_motion: Rounded button press: subtle radius-preserving scale-down (0.98) with quiet single-layer shadow at ≤0.08 opacity.

items.visual_theme: Business-card-database-grown-up — near-white surfaces with off-black #222222 body, black as the primary CTA color (B2B professional gravity), signup orange #FF5414 reserved for conversion punches only.
antipatterns: No mascots or illustration on product surfaces
items.signature_motion: Black CTA hover: subtle 1px lift via shadow; orange #FF5414 only appears once per surface at conversion moments.

items.visual_theme: Calm achromatic car-sharing chrome on pure white with cool-grey #354153 body type — SOCAR Blue reserved for the Space Frame symbol and primary booking CTA, 12/14/16px radius ladder, single-layer soft shadows.
antipatterns: No 새로운 경험을 시작하세요 decoration without action
No emoji on transactional booking/payment surfaces
items.signature_motion: Booking CTA hover: SOCAR Blue darkens one step; card lift uses single rgba(0,0,0,0.1) 0 4px 8px shadow, never chromatic stacks.
items.category_raw: Mobility / Car-Sharing (SOCAR Blue approximation — exact hex unpublished)

items.visual_theme: Career marketplace as growth mentor — single decisive cobalt #0066FF for interaction only on a warm-white canvas, custom Wanted Sans + Pretendard, 12px-radius JobCard with salary + 합격보상금 visible by structural rule.
antipatterns: No 대박 채용/핫한 회사/놓치지 마세요 urgency marketing
No competitive/negotiable in lieu of a range
items.signature_motion: JobCard hover: 12px-radius lift with bookmark icon outline→filled transition; brand blue used only on interactive states.

items.visual_theme: Near-monochrome real-estate map tool — near-black #171719 type at weight 400, functional blue #0066ff for action only, brand orange reserved for wordmark, disabled-by-transparency neutrals so the map carries the surface.
antipatterns: No 지금 바로!/놓치지 마세요!/최저가 보장 urgency
No exclamation marks on routine CTAs
No orange on functional UI (brand-mark only)
items.signature_motion: Map-floating chrome: 8/10px-radius chips fade to rgba(55,56,60,0.16) on disabled; bookmark toggle is 50% circular outline→filled.

items.visual_theme: Mobile-as-canvas fashion playground locked to 600px max-width even on desktop — off-white #f5f6f6 surface, ZIGZAG brand pink #fa6ee3 for wordmark + favorites, interactive pink #f55dd6 for CTAs, coral #fb4333 for alerts.
antipatterns: No desktop multi-column reflow (mobile centred is the brand)
items.signature_motion: 찜 heart: outline → filled brand pink with brief pulse; primary CTA uses pink-400 fill, darkening to pink-450/550 on hover/press.
